headline: Is Southern (SO) Pricing In Too Much Growth After Recent Utility Sector Rate Debates?
summary: If you are wondering whether Southern's current share price gives you fair value or not, it helps to start by lining up the market price against what the fundamentals suggest the stock could be worth. The stock last closed at US$96.71, with returns of 3.1% over 7 days, negative 0.8% over 30 days and 10.9% year to date, alongside 9.7% over 1 year, 44.3% over 3 years and 75.7% over 5 years. This means recent moves sit on top of a longer track record of positive returns. Recent news coverage...
